text:

Author: pi

Log:
  devel/libaravis: update 0.5.11 -> 0.5.12

  - gigevision: disable GVSP extended id mode
  - genicam: fix for signedness of register nodes
  - genicam: add support for optional ROUND parameter (Aleksandr)
  - add man page (Chiara)
